KeyVault.//: In Production, App Service sets KeyVault:Uri (e.g. https://savvy-kv.vault.azure.net/) and secrets load via Managed Identity. Uri empty + UseMock=false here means no vault is used and the non-secret ConnectionStrings default above applies.

Jwt.//: Issuer/Audience/ExpiryMinutes are non-secret. Jwt:SigningKey is a secret supplied by the vault (mock in dev, Azure Key Vault in prod) — never commit it.

Notifications.//: Enabled/Provider are non-secret. The webhook URLs (Notifications--Discord--WebhookUrl / Notifications--Teams--WebhookUrl) are secrets from the vault. Provider selects Discord (local) or Teams (Azure).
